transitions.has_backpack: ctrl.armor('chest', '$sophisticatedbackpacks:backpack') || ctrl.armor('chest', '$sophisticatedbackpacks:copper_backpack') || ctrl.armor('chest', '$sophisticatedbackpacks:iron_backpack') || ctrl.armor('chest', '$sophisticatedbackpacks:gold_backpack') || ctrl.armor('chest', '$sophisticatedbackpacks:diamond_backpack') || ctrl.armor('chest', '$sophisticatedbackpacks:netherite_backpack') || ysm.has_any_curios('back', 'sophisticatedbackpacks:backpack', 'sophisticatedbackpacks:copper_backpack', 'sophisticatedbackpacks:iron_backpack', 'sophisticatedbackpacks:gold_backpack', 'sophisticatedbackpacks:diamond_backpack', 'sophisticatedbackpacks:netherite_backpack')
